description:
Purpose: make local runtime debugging a product feature.

Done when:
- users can answer what happened in a turn without reading logs
- errors are normalized, readable, and safe to display
- debugging output is structured, bounded, and safe by default

comments.text: E7 completed: normalized display-oriented error maps, safe public error formatting, bounded request inspection summaries, prompt previews, direct Kino request debugging, and sanitized AgentView debug event projections. Full verification passed on the closing child.

title: V3 E7: Errors, debugging, and inspection
